title: Preview page renders Contextual Hero section with all 9 variants
description: Verify the preview page shows all Contextual Hero widget variants
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load
Verify the heading 'Widget Screenshot Preview' is visible
Scroll to find the 'Contextual Hero' section heading
Verify the section contains widget preview images (img elements)
Count the number of widget images in the Contextual Hero section - there should be 9 variant previews
Verify all images have loaded successfully (no broken images, naturalWidth > 0)

title: Preview page renders Bento Box section with all 6 variants
description: Verify the preview page shows all Bento Box widget variants
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load
Scroll to find the 'Bento Box' section heading
Verify the section contains widget preview images
Count the number of widget images in the Bento Box section - there should be 6 variant previews
Verify all images have loaded successfully (naturalWidth > 0)

title: Preview page renders Timeline section with all 5 variants
description: Verify the preview page shows all Timeline widget variants
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load
Scroll to find the 'Timeline' section heading (the standalone Timeline, not Timeline + Tasks)
Verify the section contains widget preview images
Count the number of widget images in the Timeline section - there should be 5 variant previews
Verify all images have loaded successfully

title: Preview page renders all 5 Timeline + Tasks sub-variant sections
description: Verify the preview page shows all Timeline + Tasks sub-variant sections
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load
Scroll to find 'Timeline + Tasks' sections
Verify 'Inline' sub-variant section exists with 2 widget images (light, dark)
Verify 'Pinned' or 'Pinned Block' sub-variant section exists with 2 widget images
Verify 'Nested' or 'Nested Sub-tasks' sub-variant section exists with 2 widget images
Verify 'Floating' or 'Floating Card' sub-variant section exists with 2 widget images
Verify 'Progress' or 'Progress Header' sub-variant section exists with 2 widget images
Verify all images have loaded successfully

title: Preview page renders Minimalist Stack section with all 7 variants
description: Verify the preview page shows all Minimalist Stack widget variants
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load
Scroll to find the 'Minimalist Stack' section heading
Verify the section contains widget preview images
Count the number of widget images - there should be 7 variant previews
Verify all images have loaded successfully

title: Preview page renders Progress Ring, Companion Quote, Streak Flame, Daily Score sections
description: Verify the preview page shows all remaining widget layout sections
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load
Scroll to find the 'Progress Ring' section - verify it has 2 widget images (dark, light)
Scroll to find the 'Companion Quote' section - verify it has 2 widget images (warm, frost)
Scroll to find the 'Streak Flame' section - verify it has 2 widget images (fire, cool)
Scroll to find the 'Daily Score' section - verify it has 2 widget images (dark, light)
Verify all images across all sections have loaded successfully (no broken images)

title: Preview page total widget count matches expected 45 variants
description: Verify the total number of widget preview images on the preview page
steps: Navigate to /preview
Wait for the page to fully load with a longer timeout (30 seconds) since all widget images need to render
Count ALL widget preview img elements on the entire page
Verify the total count is at least 45 (9 contextual-hero + 6 bento-box + 5 timeline + 10 timeline-tasks + 7 minimalist-stack + 2 progress-ring + 2 companion-quote + 2 streak-flame + 2 daily-score)
Scroll through the entire page to trigger any lazy-loaded images
Verify no images are broken (check for error states or zero-size images)
